executives.name: James Sykes
executives.background: Mr. Sykes has over 15 years of uranium exploration and discovery experience in the Athabasca Basin. He was instrumental in the discovery of the Roughrider, Arrow, and Triple R deposits. He previously served as Vice President, Exploration for Appia Energy Corp. and has held roles with NexGen Energy, Hathor Exploration, and Rio Tinto.

executives.name: Stephen Stewart
executives.background: Mr. Stewart is the Chairman of the Orefinders Resources and Mistango River Resources. He has over 15 years of experience in the resource sector, focusing on corporate development and capital markets. He is also the founder of the Young Mining Professionals.
